title: Fun Time Casey the Caterpillar Baby Toy, Educational Activity Toy with Sound, Snap Together Balls, 12+ Months
features: INTERACTIVE DESIGN: Colourful snap-together balls form an engaging caterpillar toy that encourages fine motor skills development and hand-eye coordination
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children 12 months and older, offering safe and entertaining play experiences
SENSORY FEATURES: Each segment contains different textures, colours, and sounds to stimulate multiple senses during playtime
EDUCATIONAL VALUE: Helps develop cognitive skills through shape recognition, colour identification, and cause-and-effect learning
EASY ASSEMBLY: Simple snap-together design allows little ones to create their own caterpillar while strengthening their problem-solving abilities
description: Product Description Introduce your little one to a world of sensory exploration with Casey the Caterpillar from Fun Time. This delightful interactive toy features five interconnecting balls that snap together to create an adorable caterpillar, perfect for developing fine motor skills. Each segment offers unique activities and sounds to engage your baby's senses - from a cheerful face with antennae to transparent spheres with rattling elements, and colourful textured surfaces. Designed for children 12 months and older, this versatile toy encourages hand-eye coordination, colour recognition, and tactile development through play. The chunky, easy-to-grasp pieces are ideal for little hands, while the snap-together design helps toddlers understand cause and effect. Whether used as individual play balls or connected as a complete caterpillar, this toy provides multiple ways to learn and have fun. The bright colours and varying textures make playtime both entertaining and educational, stimulating your child's cognitive development and imagination. Safety Warning No applicable warning Box Contains 1 x Casey the Caterpillar See more
